title: Data Model
description: The validated data model (tables, fields, relations) of a project. It is the source of truth: the data_model.drawio and data_model.html exports are generated by the backend from this JSON. tables[].pos is the manual position of the box in the editor (frontend), set by the user dragging it — never generated by the agent for new tables, and it must be preserved (matched by id) when the agent regenerates or updates the document.

date.description: Date the data model was validated, YYYY-MM-DD format.

status.description: Editorial state of the document, for the 'chat stays conversational' UX: 'draft' while it is still being refined with the user in chat (citing elements by id), 'confirmed' once the user has validated the content. Optional field, for compatibility with pre-existing documents that do not carry it yet — a document without 'status' is treated as a draft.

areas.description: Functional areas used to colour and group the tables in the diagrams (e.g. 'Core', 'Support', 'Configuration').

name.description: Readable name of the functional area.

color.description: Hex colour used for the table header in the diagrams.

id.description: Unique table identifier, used as a reference in relations[].

area.description: Reference to areas[].id — the functional area the table belongs to.

type.description: Data type (e.g. TEXT, INTEGER, DATE, BOOLEAN, DECIMAL).

pk.description: True if the field is (part of) the primary key.

fk.description: A 'table.field' reference if the field is a foreign key.

nullable.description: True if the field can be null.

pos.description: Manual position of the box on the canvas of the frontend editor (set by dragging the table). If absent, the editor computes an automatic layout position. Optional field, never written by the agent for new tables.

x.description: X coordinate of the box on the canvas.

y.description: Y coordinate of the box on the canvas.

relations.description: Relations between tables (the edges in the ER diagrams).

from.description: Source 'table.field' reference (the N side in the typical N:1 foreign key).

to.description: Target 'table.field' reference (typically the primary key of the parent table).

label.description: Optional label on the edge (e.g. a description of the relation).
